description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a matte gray body and a contrasting black countertop. The front features two wide drawers at the top, each with a rectangular recessed handle, and two large doors below, each with a vertical handle for easy access. The cabinet has a short backsplash along the rear edge of the countertop, providing a functional barrier against spills. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The base is slightly recessed and finished in black, giving the cabinet a sturdy, grounded appearance. This type of cabinet is commonly found in urban garages, workshops, or utility rooms, offering ample storage and a durable work surface.
description: A sturdy, gray freestanding cabinet with a black countertop, two drawers, and two doors with handles, designed for storage and workspace in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with recessed handles and two large doors with vertical handles beneath a black countertop.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, solid gray side panel and the black countertop with backsplash.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, featureless gray back panel and the black base and countertop edges.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain gray panel and visible door hinges.
